chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-232 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 27-02-2025 None present for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, APG P.G for the State. Proposed accused No.2 to 4 are present in person. ***** None present for the applicant. However, on perusal of impugned order dated 03.04.2024, it appears that learned Additional Sessions Judge-V/ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Sukkur has dismissed the application filed by applicant seeking registration of FIR against proposed accused for the reasons that mere allegations of corrupt and corrupt practices so also misuse of powers have been leveled against the proposed accused No.1, who conducted investigation in the case; however, such grievance of the applicant has been redressed by the Magistrate. From perusal of impugned order, it depicts that learned Additional Sessions Judge has assigned valid and cogent reasons while passing the impugned order and no illegality or infirmity is found in the impugned order requiring interference of this Court. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed. JUDGE Ahmad
